zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne於1282年出生時，他的父親Robert VI d'Auvergne37歲，母親Béatrice de Montgascon18歲。他於1303年7月11日與Blanche de CLERMONT在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。他去世於1325年10月13日享年43歲，埋葬在法國奧維普-德-o倫德-吉布隆。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne was born in 1282, his father, Robert VI d'Auvergne, was 37 and his mother, Béatrice de Montgascon, was 18. He married Blanche de CLERMONT on 11 July 1303, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. He died on 13 October 1325, at the age of 43, and was buried in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne est né en 1282, son père, Robert VI d'Auvergne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Montgascon, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de CLERMONT le 11 juillet 1303, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1325, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne 1282 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert VI d'Auvergne 37 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Montgascon 18. Er hat am 11. Juli 1303 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Blanche de CLERMONT geheiratet. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1325 im Alter von 43 Jahren und wurde in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne è nato il nel 1282, il suo padre, Robert VI d'Auvergne, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Montgascon, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Blanche de CLERMONT il 11 luglio 1303, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Morì il 13 ottobre 1325, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogneが1282年に生まれた時，父Robert VI d'Auvergneは37歳，母Béatrice de Montgasconは18歳であった。1303年7月11日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでBlanche de CLERMONTと結婚した。彼は1325年10月13日に43歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメイロンデ-エト-ブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne(이)가 1282년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert VI d'Auvergne(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Montgascon(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1303년 7월 11일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Blanche de CLERMONT(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1325년 10월 13일 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 이론데-트-버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne nasceu em 1282, seu pai, Robert VI d'Auvergne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Montgascon, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de CLERMONT em 11 de julho de 1303, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1325, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne родился в 1282 г., его отцу по имени Robert VI d'Auvergne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Montgascon, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de CLERMONT 11 июля 1303 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Он умер 13 октября 1325 г. в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности иронде-ет-бурон, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne nació en 1282, su papá, Robert VI d'Auvergne, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Montgascon, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Blanche de CLERMONT el 11 de julio de 1303, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1325, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia.
